subject: feat(patterns): make pattern cards clickable with detail page and copy
body:
Pattern cards now work like project cards — click to reveal a "View
pattern" link that opens a detail page with the full implementation
doc rendered as markdown, plus "Copy markdown" and "Raw file" buttons.

New files:
- pattern.html: Pattern detail page with markdown viewer, copy button,
  and raw file link. Uses same markdown renderer and .md-render CSS
  as project.html.

Changes:
- index.html: Added card-links with "View pattern" to all 7 pattern
  cards (PWA System, Theme & Dark Mode, Burger Menu, App Icons,
  Download as PDF, HTTPS Proxy, Debug System)
- vite.config.js: Extended copyRootFiles plugin to copy
  docs/implementations/*.md to dist/patterns/ at build time. Added
  dev server middleware to serve patterns/ from docs/implementations/
  during development. Registered pattern.html in multi-page config.
- README.md: Added pattern.html to project structure

Tags: feature, patterns, ui, ux
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pattern-viewer
Semver: minor
